quality_recommendations: HIGH: 91 advisories contain source URL noise in IOC table. Add cybersecuritynews.com and major news domains to IOC suppression list.
MEDIUM: 702 advisories (35%) below 40% enrichment. CVSS and EPSS enrichment pipeline requires review — consider CVSS NVD batch lookup.
CRITICAL: Average trust score 38.7/100 is below commercial threshold. Immediate enrichment pipeline audit required.
